---
title: "Publications"
---

## Journal Articles

**Language and Status: The Social Stratification of Bilingualism in the Basque Autonomous Community**  
Mattioli, L. · *International Social Science Review* · 102(1) · 2026  
[https://doi.org/issr.ungjournals.org/articles/839](https://issr.ungjournals.org/articles/839)

<!-- --- -->

## Book Reviews

**Beyond GDP: The Quest for a Meaningful Measurement of Progress**  
Review of *The Measure of Progress: Counting What Really Matters* by Diane Coyle  
Mattioli, L. · *The International Spectator* · 2025  
[https://doi.org/10.1080/03932729.2025.2586950](https://doi.org/10.1080/03932729.2025.2586950)
